chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P No.D-3126 of 2017 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S). For hearing of Main Case. 30.03.2022 Mr. Zia ul Hassan, Advocate for the petitioner. Ms. Masooda Siraj, Advocate for Respondent. Mr. Kafeel Ahmed Abbasi, D.A.G..-.-.-.-.-. The instant petition has been filed on the ground that the department was not implementing the order of the Tribunal dated 18.11.2015 in Customs Appeals No.K-541 & K-542 of 2015, thereafter notices were issued to the Respondents. Today comments have been filed on behalf of the Respondents, wherein it has been admitted that since no SCRAs were filed against the said order, the order of the Tribunal has attained finality and the same is required to be implemented. We therefore, in view of the admitted position, direct the Respondent No.1 to implement order in letter and spirit within 15 days’ time from the date of receipt of this order. Needless to state that if compliance of the order is not made, adverse inference would be drawn against the Collector. With these directions instant petition stands disposed of alongwith pending application, if any. JUDGE JUDGE SM
